back: An Integrated Development Environment is software that helps programmers write, test and debug source code.

front: What are the main functions of an IDE?

back: A tool that allows the programmer to write and edit source code.
Allows a program to be executed and tested, showing output and errors.

front: What is the role of a translator in an IDE?
back: Converts source code into machine code so it can be executed.

front: What types of translators can be used in an IDE?

back: Tools that help identify and fix errors, often showing line numbers and suggestions.
Suggests keywords or variable names as the programmer types.
Automatically fixes simple spelling or syntax mistakes.
Automatically formats code using indentation and layout to improve readability.
They make it easier to locate errors in code.
Uses colours to make code easier to read.
They help programmers write code more efficiently and reduce errors.
